title: Ashok Gehlot breaks silence on Sachin Pilot: ‘I facilitated his rise, but he never acknowledged it’
description: Ex-CM Gehlot took to X and claimed that he played a pivotal role in Sachin Pilot's ascent to the Union Cabinet. Expressing deep personal hurt, Gehlot noted that despite his active efforts to secure a ministerial berth for Pilot, the latter never publicly acknowledged the support.
